basic_details.short_information: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited has released the official Apprentice Notification 2026 on 18 May 2026 at the official website of HAL. Vacancies have been announced under the HAL Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 14 to 27 years with a qualification of 10+2 with Science and Mathematics or equivalent along with ITI passed with National Trade Certificate (NCVT) can apply online from 18-05-2026 to 03-06-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 14 years Maximum Age: 27 years Age Relaxation: OBC: 03 years SC/ST: 05 years Differently Abled Category (40% disability): 10 years (15 years for SCs/STs and 13 years for OBCs)

qualification.education_qualification: 10+2 system with Science and Mathematics or its equivalent + ITI passed with National Trade Certificate issued by National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT)
qualification.details: All Posts: Passed 10th class under 10+2 system with Science and Mathematics or its equivalent + ITI passed with National Trade Certificate issued by National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT). Electronics Mechanic: Passed 10th class under 10+2 system with Science and Mathematics or its equivalent + ITI passed with National Trade Certificate issued by National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT). Electrician: Passed 10th class examination under 10+2 system with Science as one of the subject or its equivalent + ITI passed with National Trade Certificate issued by National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT). Fitter: Passed 10th class Examination under 10+2 system of education or its equivalent + ITI passed with National Trade Certificate issued by National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT). Turner: Passed in 10th class under 10+2 system of education or its equivalent + ITI passed with National Trade Certificate issued by National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT). Machinist: Passed in 10th class under 10+2 system of education or its equivalent + ITI passed with National Trade Certificate issued by National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT). Instrument Mechanic: Passed 10th class examination under 10+2 system of education with Science as one of the subjects or its equivalent + ITI passed with National Trade Certificate issued by National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT). Refrigeration & Air Conditioning Mechanic: Passed 10th class examination with Science and Mathematics under 10+2 system of education or its equivalent + ITI passed with National Trade Certificate issued by National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT). Draughtsman (Mechanical): Passed 10th class examination under 10+2 system with Science and Mathematics as subjects + ITI passed with National Trade Certificate issued by National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT). Computer Operator & Programming Assistant (COPA): Passed 12th class examination under 10+2 system of education with Science or Commerce + ITI passed with National Trade Certificate issued by National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT). Machinist (Grinder): Passed 10th class examination under 10+2 system of education or its equivalent + ITI passed with National Trade Certificate issued by National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT). Mechanic (Motor Vehicle): Passed 10th class examination under 10+2 system of education or its equivalent + ITI passed with National Trade Certificate issued by National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT). Electroplater: Passed 10th class examination under 10+2 system of education or its equivalent + ITI passed with National Trade Certificate issued by National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT). Welder (Gas & Electric): Passed 10th class examination under 10+2 system of education or its equivalent + ITI passed with National Trade Certificate issued by National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT). Painter (General): Passed 10th class or its equivalent + ITI passed with National Trade Certificate issued by National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT). Plumber: Passed 10th class examination under 10+2 system of education or its equivalent + ITI passed with National Trade Certificate issued by National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT).

salary_details.pay_scale: As per rule per month or as revised by the Regional Directorate of Skill Development & Entrepreneurship, Kanpur
salary_details.details: Salary will be as per rule per month or as revised by the Regional Directorate of Skill Development & Entrepreneurship, Kanpur.

selection_process: Selection will be based on 100% Merit basis
taking into consideration 70% Weightage of Total Aggregate Marks secured in the 10th class & 30% weightage of Total Aggregate Marks secured in the ITI Examination.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the HAL Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HAL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for HAL Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the HAL Apprentice recruitment is 03 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for HAL Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the HAL Apprentice posts is 14 years. Candidates must meet this age criterion to be eligible for the apprenticeship.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for HAL Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the HAL Apprentice recruitment is 27 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for HAL Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 10th class under the 10+2 system with Science and Mathematics or its equivalent, along with an ITI passed certificate from NCVT.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the HAL Apprentice positions?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on 100% merit, with 70% weightage given to 10th class marks and 30% weightage to ITI examination marks.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for HAL Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the provided data, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the HAL Apprentice recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for HAL Apprentices?
faq.answer: The salary for HAL Apprentices will be as per the rule per month or as revised by the Regional Directorate of Skill Development & Entrepreneurship, Kanpur.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for HAL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is advisable to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates apply offline for the HAL Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: No, applications for the HAL Apprentice recruitment must be submitted online only through the designated Google Application Form and the official portal.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of HAL recruitment in Uttar Pradesh?
faq.answer: The HAL recruitment for these Apprentice posts is located in Amethi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 227412.
